title: Crypto range dca bot 85% WR
author: One_Rope_1117
selftext: Hello everyone im not a professional trader but i consider my self smart , i made with ai a crypto range bot on 5m tf  wich is performing pretty well the filters work great rsi adx and bb and some smart features with s/r , but still when market moves sharp up or down i get some sl trades wich drag me down , any suggestions ideas ? I can give the bot free if someone can help me optimize it

comments.author: Extra-Compote7143
comments.body: you need at least 1 year track record

comments.author: PennyRoyalTeeHee
comments.body:
A couple things to help you from a trading perspective.

DCA strategies are not suited for short time frames - they are better utilized over long time series without a stop loss - in short it is an investment strategy that is well suited for stable markets, crypto is notoriously volatile. Your stops will continue to get tagged and take away your wins.

I am assuming you are looking to take advantage of the volatility by using DCA - I assure you, volatile instruments will punish you.

Take time to develop a momentum/breakout strategy for high volatility // During low volatility, a good mean reversion strategy should serve you - both should have stops and targets that are not heavily skewed.

from a systematic perspective - you should develop your regime filter (looks like you’re working on it on the top left) - filtering for volatility is overlooked, in the end, what serves you will be finding steady stable growth.

If you feel that DCA is the best way to go, you should spend time fine tuning your risk management and looking to add another level of exit on top of the final stop loss (eg: 5 candles in opposing direction > close 50% of position).

Good luck!
